violations.description: Loud parties after quiet hours multiple times
Repeated unauthorized parking in reserved spot
Unauthorized satellite dish and wind chimes

rules.title: Dues Requirement
rules.description: Residents must be current on HOA dues to submit maintenance requests.

rules.title: Violation Resolution
rules.description: All outstanding violations must be resolved before submitting maintenance requests.

rules.title: Board Approval
rules.description: Maintenance requests exceeding $500 require board approval via the request_board_approval tool.

rules.title: Budget Constraints
rules.description: The maintenance committee must verify sufficient budget remains before board approval.

rules.title: Emergency Exemption
rules.description: Requests marked 'urgent' priority bypass board approval if estimated cost is under $1000 and budget allows.

rules.title: Multiple Violations
rules.description: Residents with 3 or more open violations must also attend a compliance hearing before requests are approved. Use schedule_compliance_hearing to fulfill this requirement.

rules.title: High-Cost Escalation
rules.description: Requests exceeding $5000 require both board approval and budget committee sign-off via the request_budget_committee_approval tool.

rules.title: Noise Ordinance
rules.description: Quiet hours are 10pm-7am. Violations result in a fine of $50-$150.

rules.title: Parking Rules
rules.description: Each unit is assigned one parking spot. Unauthorized vehicles will be fined.

rules.title: Pet Policy
rules.description: All pets must be registered and leashed in common areas. Maximum 2 pets per unit. Exotic pets require board approval.

rules.title: Balcony Modifications
rules.description: Any modifications to balconies require prior written approval from the board.

rules.title: Smoking Policy
rules.description: No smoking in common indoor areas. Designated outdoor areas only.

rules.title: Guest Policy
rules.description: Guests staying longer than 14 consecutive days must be registered with the HOA.

rules.title: Subletting
rules.description: Subletting is prohibited without board approval. Violations carry a $200 fine.

rules.title: Amenity Booking
rules.description: Amenities (pool, gym, clubhouse) can be reserved through the book_amenity tool.
